translations.en: My shoulders feel too stiff these days.
translations.es: Últimamente tengo los hombros muy tiesos.
translations.fr: Mes épaules sont trop raides ces jours-ci.
translations.de: Meine Schultern sind in letzter Zeit zu steif.
translations.it: Sento le spalle troppo rigide in questi giorni.
translations.zh-Hans: 最近我的肩膀感觉很僵硬。
translations.ru: Мои плечи в последнее время слишком напряжены.
translations.pt: Ultimamente meus ombros estão muito rígidos.
translations.he: הכתפיים שלי מאוד תפוסות בזמן האחרון.
translations.vi: Gần đây vai tôi cứng quá.
translations.ar: أشعر بأن كتفي جامد جدًا هذه الأيام.
translations.nl: Mijn schouders voelen de laatste tijd erg stijf.
translations.uk: Останнім часом мої плечі дуже напружені.
translations.hi: इन दिनों मेरे कंधे बहुत जकड़े हुए लगते हैं.
translations.pl: Ostatnio moje ramiona są bardzo sztywne.
translations.el: Τον τελευταίο καιρό οι ώμοί μου είναι πολύ σφιχτοί.
translations.nb: Skuldrene mine føles for stive for tiden.
translations.id: Akhir-akhir ini bahu saya terasa sangat kaku.
translations.sv: Mina axlar känns alldeles för stela nuförtiden.
translations.ro: Umerii mei se simt prea rigizi în ultima vreme.
translations.cs: Poslední dobou mám ramena moc ztuhlá.
translations.da: Mine skuldre føles alt for stive for tiden.
translations.ja: 最近肩がとても凝っている。

tokens.explanation: Noun 'shoulder' with subject particle '가' marking the nominative subject.

translations.en: I'll give your shoulder a little massage.
translations.es: Te daré un pequeño masaje en el hombro.
translations.fr: Je vais te faire un petit massage de l’épaule.
translations.de: Ich massiere dir ein wenig die Schulter.
translations.it: Ti farò un piccolo massaggio alla spalla.
translations.pt: Vou te dar uma pequena massagem no ombro.
translations.he: אני אתן לך עיסוי קל בכתף.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ xoa vai bạn một chút.
translations.nl: Ik geef je een kleine schoudermassage.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे कंधे की थोड़ी मालिश कर दूंगा.
translations.el: Θα σου κάνω ένα μικρό μασάζ στον ώμο.
translations.nb: Jeg skal gi deg en liten skuldermassasje.
translations.sv: Jag ska ge dig en liten massage på axeln.
translations.ro: O să-ți fac un mic masaj la umăr.
translations.da: Jeg vil give dig en lille skuldermassage.
translations.ja: 肩を少しマッサージしてあげる。

tokens.explanation: Verb 'to massage/rub' in connective/imperative form for the benefit of the listener.
Auxiliary verb 'to give,' indicating speaker's willingness or promise ('I'll do it for you').

translations.en: My shoulder hurts because the bag is heavy.
translations.es: Me duele el hombro porque la bolsa es pesada.
translations.fr: Mon épaule me fait mal parce que le sac est lourd.
translations.de: Meine Schulter tut weh, weil die Tasche schwer ist.
translations.it: Mi fa male la spalla perché la borsa è pesante.
translations.zh-Hans: 因为包太重，我的肩膀很痛。
translations.yue: 因為書包太重，我隻膊頭好痛。
translations.ru: Моё плечо болит, потому что сумка тяжёлая.
translations.pt: Meu ombro dói porque a bolsa está pesada.
translations.he: הכתף שלי כואבת כי התיק כבד.
translations.tr: Çanta ağır olduğu için omzum ağrıyor.
translations.vi: Vai tôi đau vì cái túi nặng.
translations.nl: Mijn schouder doet pijn omdat de tas zwaar is.
translations.uk: Моє плече болить, бо сумка важка.
translations.hu: Fáj a vállam, mert a táska nehéz.
translations.hi: मेरे कंधे में दर्द हो रहा है क्योंकि बैग भारी है.
translations.pl: Boli mnie ramię, bo torba jest ciężka.
translations.el: Ο ώμος μου πονάει γιατί η τσάντα είναι βαριά.
translations.nb: Skulderen min gjør vondt fordi veska er tung.
translations.id: Bahu saya sakit karena tas itu berat.
translations.sv: Min axel gör ont eftersom väskan är tung.
translations.ro: Umărul meu doare pentru că geanta este grea.
translations.cs: Bolí mě rameno, protože ta taška je těžká.
translations.da: Min skulder gør ondt, fordi tasken er tung.
translations.fi: Olkapääni sattuu, koska laukku on painava.
translations.ja: かばんが重いので肩が痛い。

tokens.explanation: Noun 'bag' with subject particle '이' marking the subject in the clause.
Adjective 'heavy' plus connective ending '-어서,' indicating cause ('because it is heavy').
Adjective 'to hurt,' in the present informal/casual form.

translations.en: The coat fits my shoulders well.
translations.es: El abrigo me queda bien en los hombros.
translations.fr: Le manteau me va bien aux épaules.
translations.de: Der Mantel passt mir gut an den Schultern.
translations.it: Il cappotto mi sta bene sulle spalle.
translations.zh-Hans: 这件大衣很合我的肩膀。
translations.yue: 呢件大褸好啱我隻膊頭。
translations.pt: O casaco se ajusta bem aos meus ombros.
translations.vi: Chiếc áo khoác này vừa vặn với vai tôi.
translations.nl: De jas past goed op mijn schouders.
translations.uk: Пальто добре сидить на моїх плечах.
translations.hu: A kabát jól illeszkedik a vállaimra.
translations.hi: कोट मेरे कंधों पर अच्छी तरह बैठता है.
translations.pl: Płaszcz dobrze leży na moich ramionach.
translations.el: Το παλτό εφαρμόζει καλά στους ώμους μου.
translations.id: Mantel ini pas di bahu saya.
translations.sv: Kappan passar bra över mina axlar.
translations.ro: Paltonul îmi vine bine pe umeri.
translations.cs: Kabát mi dobře sedí na ramenou.
translations.da: Frakken passer godt på mine skuldre.
translations.ja: コートが肩によく合う。

tokens.explanation: Verb 'to wrap' in polite present tense '-아요.'

en: My shoulders feel too stiff these days.
I'll give your shoulder a little massage.
My shoulder hurts because the bag is heavy.
The coat fits my shoulders well.

tokens.explanation: Noun 'shoulder' with subject particle '가' marking the nominative subject.
Verb 'to massage/rub' in connective/imperative form for the benefit of the listener.
Auxiliary verb 'to give,' indicating speaker's willingness or promise ('I'll do it for you').
Noun 'bag' with subject particle '이' marking the subject in the clause.
Adjective 'heavy' plus connective ending '-어서,' indicating cause ('because it is heavy').
Adjective 'to hurt,' in the present informal/casual form.
Verb 'to wrap' in polite present tense '-아요.'
